title: The Ice Flood
writer: Johnston McCulley, George B. Seitz, James O. Spearing
actors: Kenneth Harlan, Viola Dana, Frank Hagney
plot: Jack De Quincy, an American graduate of Oxford, is still considered a wastrel playboy by his father, owner of a giant lumber company in the American northwest. To prove he is a man his father sends him there to take charge of a la...
